commitStrategyReview.notes: Three atomic units. Each commit maps to a single dominant intent. domain-map.json included in allowRelated of unit 1 as prerequisite for index.md mapping.

subject.target: universal agent entrypoint and discovery index

units.purpose: define the canonical loading protocol and neutral discovery index for repository-portable agents

messagePreview.header: docs(docs): establish universal agent entrypoint and discovery index
summary: define universal loading protocol in README.md with precedence and fallback rules
create index.md as the neutral discovery index for skills, workflows, and canonical docs
add minimal load matrix and ambiguity handling guidelines

subject.target: structured metadata for skills and workflows

units.purpose: add when_to_use, preconditions, inputs, outputs, and related_docs frontmatter to all agent capabilities

messagePreview.header: docs(docs): register structured metadata for skills and workflows
summary: add when_to_use, preconditions, inputs, outputs, and related_docs to all skill frontmatter
add name and structured metadata blocks to all workflow frontmatter
enable discovery-index-driven loading for all agent capabilities

units.purpose: update DOC_STATUS.md to reflect the new agent governance structure and entrypoint hierarchy

messagePreview.header: docs(docs): align documentation status and governance rules
summary: update workflow listing to reflect current inventory
add governance rules for entrypoint hierarchy and provider-portable design
renumber documentation rules to accommodate new agent governance entries
